actions.leaf_title: Extend CLI router to support temperature domain

revised.title: Fix convert crash introduced by temperature router change
revised.content:
The router change crashes `unitconv convert` for factor domains (regression in the dispatch fallthrough). Restore factor dispatch while keeping the temperature route.

Files: unitconv/cli/router.py, tests/test_router.py

Acceptance criteria:
- `unitconv convert 1 m ft` exits 0 again (regression test)
- temperature dispatch unchanged

Test expectations: factor-domain regression test in tests/test_router.py

actions.rationale: Under-cap failure; revised spec stays inside the strict LeafSpec vocabulary.
